svg.text: Brain Stroke Risk Prediction — System Architecture
Capstone Project CS5998 | P.D.S. PERERA (258733L) | University of Moratuwa | Milestone 2
Kaggle Stroke Prediction Dataset — 5,110 patient records · 11 features · Anonymised
fedesoriano (2021) · Binary target: stroke (0 / 1) · Class imbalance ~4.87%
Training set only · 4.87% → 50% · Synthetic minority examples
Python · Scikit-learn · XGBoost · CatBoost · TensorFlow/Keras · Pandas · NumPy · Seaborn · SHAP · Imbalanced-learn
• SHAP summary plot — feature impact direction & magnitude
• SHAP bar chart — global mean |SHAP| importance
• Feature importance cross-validated with RF and XGBoost scores
Top features: Age · Avg Glucose Level · BMI · Cardio Risk
✓ Full performance metrics table — all 9 models
[ Milestone 3 — Streamlit Web App for real-time stroke risk prediction ]
